essence: Performs maritime search and rescue operations to save lives at sea and along coastlines.

identity.title: Coastguard Rescue Officer
identity.summary: Responds to maritime emergencies, operates rescue craft, and coordinates with emergency services to conduct rescues and safety patrols.

salary.notes: Specialist roles and senior coordinators receive higher compensation.

qualifications: Maritime rescue training and boat handling qualifications
First aid and casualty care certification
Strong physical fitness and sea‑going experience
Ability to work in hazardous and changing conditions

lifestyle.description: Shift and on‑call work with exposure to harsh weather; high responsibility for public safety and emergency response.

habits: Responds to distress calls and conducts rescues
Operates and maintains rescue craft and equipment
Provides casualty care and coordinates handover
Conducts safety patrols and community engagement
